security.csp: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' asset: https://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' http: https: ws: wss:; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost data:; font-src 'self' data:;

bundle.shortDescription: Management console for the Hivemind platform.
bundle.longDescription: Hivemind Admin provides agent creation, knowledge management, client controls, and local server operations.
